title: Playing with Fire
writer: William M. Clayton, J.U. Giesy, Doris Schroeder
actors: Gladys Walton, Kathryn McGuire, Eddie Gribbon
plot: Enid Gregory plays the piano at a music store on Broadway, and is content with her snappy, routine existence until Janet Fenwick, a society girl whose father committed suicide under a cloud of financial disgrace, comes to Enid's boar
